originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__m_has_modinfo_1618` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&m_has_modinfo` is never used.
model:
(define-fun __need_malloc_and_calloc () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_39 (different tool: Pulse DEAD_STORE vs CSA deadcode.DeadStores). m_has_modinfo is assigned at L16 and L18 in if/else branches but never read afterwards. Genuine dead store. No // ERROR, new bug. PC = !_STDLIB_H AND !__need_malloc_and_calloc (library macros only); restrictive !_STDLIB_H makes PC over-constrained — bug fires in all compilable configs, not just non-standard stdlib header states.
